--- Certified Waterproofing Services | Sydney, NSW ---
Free Quote: 0417 718 357 Email: mditiling@gmail. com HOME TILING BATHROOM RENOVATIONS POOLS OUTDOOR WATERPROOFING GALLERY ABOUT US CONTACT US WATERPROOFING Advanced Waterproofing Services to Protect Your Investment MDI Tiling delivers certified waterproofing for residential and commercial properties across Sydney, NSW.

Paving With Stone & Tiles We pave driveways, paths, and garden walkways using: Travertine: Elegant and cool underfoot Limestone and Sandstone: Natural and rustic aesthetics Porcelain and Concrete: Perfect for modern homes and high-traffic areas Paving is applied over compacted bases with screeding and sealing for a long-lasting result. Balcony Waterproofing & Tiling Balconies are prone to leaks and movement.

We offer: Certified membrane application with a 7-year guarantee Tiling using flexible adhesives and expansion joints Drainage channel installation where required Whether you need a fresh finish or a complete rebuild, our balconies are watertight and attractive. Stacked Stone & Feature Walls We also install stacked stone on: Feature walls Fence cladding Outdoor kitchens Garden beds and planters These walling solutions add texture and luxury to any outdoor space.

Call 0417 718 357 to talk with our team at MDI Tiling about certified waterproofing solutions for your property. HOME TILING BATHROOM RENOVATIONS POOLS OUTDOOR WATERPROOFING GALLERY ABOUT US CONTACT US CONTACT INFORMATION Phone: 0417 718 357 Email: mditiling@gmail.
Our team provides reliable membrane applications for wet areas, balconies, rooftops, and external walls, using high-quality materials that meet Australian standards.

Additional Sealing & Caulking We handle fine waterproofing finishes like: Silicone sealing of tile junctions Caulking expansion joints and corners Grout sealing to eliminate absorption and stains Leak diagnosis and remedial waterproofing Silicone sealing of tile junctions Caulking expansion joints and corners Grout sealing to eliminate absorption and stains Leak diagnosis and remedial waterproofing Our team uses commercial-grade materials and leaves every area in immaculate condition.

Balconies & External Waterproofing Balconies are a major cause of water ingress in multi-storey properties. We offer: Torch-on membranes or liquid rubber membranes Drainage matting and fall correction if required Flexible sealants at movement joints and corners Full screeding and tile bed preparation Our team also waterproofs planter boxes, rooftops, and retaining walls with chemical-resistant membranes and long-life solutions.

--- Pool Tiling & Waterproofing Experts | Sydney, NSW ---
Free Quote: 0417 718 357 Email: mditiling@gmail.

This includes: Demolition and Removal: We remove old tiles, fixtures, and fittings and prepare the area for renovation, including frame and wall adjustments Wall Sheeting: Using fibre cement sheeting for durability and water resistance, we prepare walls to withstand humidity and tile weight Waterproofing: Our licensed team applies certified membranes to walls and floors, with a 7-year warranty to prevent leaks and long-term damage Shower Screens and Fixtures: We install custom shower screens, vanities, and toilets and coordinate with licensed plumbers for all pipework Tiling: We apply floor-to-ceiling tiles in ceramic, porcelain, or stone, ensuring clean lines and proper drainage gradients Plastering and Finishing: Our team delivers smooth finishes and repaint-ready walls to complete the transformation Kitchen Tiling & Splashbacks In the kitchen, we aim to improve both hygiene and aesthetics with quality tile installations.

These tiles: Deliver colour depth and texture underwater Are highly durable against UV exposure and chlorine Come in a wide selection of colours and patterns Can be used for full interiors, waterlines, and decorative features We carefully apply these tiles using waterproof adhesives and flexible grout, ensuring a strong hold that resists cracking over time. Pool Coping Installation We apply coping stones that frame the edge of your pool, creating a buffer between the water and the deck.

These materials are: Slip-resistant and textured for safety Installed over screeded bases for water runoff Resistant to salt and chlorinated water exposure We can also retile pool surrounds, repair cracked paving, and redesign old spaces to create a more modern and cohesive look. Give us a call on 0417 718 357 to schedule your next pool project today

--- Outdoor Tiling for Patios & Walkways | Sydney, NSW ---
Free Quote: 0417 718 357 Email: mditiling@gmail.

We provide: Alfresco Dining Areas: Using porcelain or natural stone to mix indoor and outdoor design BBQ Areas: Heat-resistant tiling around benches, walls, and splashback zones Courtyards: We offer seamless, low-maintenance areas perfect for entertaining Our team ensures all surfaces are properly prepared and sloped to drain water away safely.

Our options include: Travertine: A popular choice for its cool feel and timeless look Limestone: Strong, slip-resistant, and ideal for high-use areas Porcelain or Concrete Coping: Perfect for contemporary or commercial designs Proper coping not only adds style but also helps manage water flow and pool safety. Paving & Surround Finishes We offer tiling for pool surrounds that create a seamless look, using natural stone or large-format tiles.

Our services include: Subway Tiling: Perfect for backsplashes and feature walls, subway tiling is installed with precision and creative layout options (herringbone, stacked, etc) Benchtop Surrounds: Protect areas near sinks and stoves with heat- and stain-resistant tiles Wall Sheeting and Rendering: Our team prepares surfaces for a long-lasting bond using rendering or plasterboard as needed Floor Tiling & Screeding We also provide full internal floor tiling for homes and businesses: Floor Tiling: Using large-format porcelain, granite, or ceramic tiles, we tile living rooms, hallways, and commercial interiors Screeding: We deliver even, sloped surfaces before tiling, essential in wet areas or uneven substrates Leak Repair and Retiling: We examine and replace failed tiling in old homes, especially around wet zones Call MDI Tiling on 0417 718 357 to transform your interiors with precision indoor tiling services.
